scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.build:netlify: npm rebuild better-sqlite3 && tsx scripts/ensure-graph-db.ts && tsx scripts/prepare-netlify-function.ts && tsx scripts/embed-daily-puzzle.ts && tsx scripts/validate-daily-embed.ts && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
